name: health-copilot-monorepo
description: Health Copilot Monorepo containing Next.js client, Express API Gateway, and FastAPI Python LangGraph agent.

scripts.install:all: npm install && npm install --prefix client && npm install --prefix server-node && npm run setup:python
scripts.setup:python: cd server-python && python3 -m venv venv && ./venv/bin/pip install -r requirements.txt
scripts.dev: npx concurrently "npm run dev:client" "npm run dev:node" "npm run dev:python"
